heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 634 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: Amendments1978— struck out “, not in excess of $5,000,000 for any fiscal year,” after “sums”.Pub. L. 95–2561974—, increased appropriations authorization to $5,000,000 from $3,000,000.Pub. L. 93–259, § 28(a)(5)
Effective Date of 1974 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 93–259section 29(a) of Pub. L. 93–259section 202 of this titleMay 1, 1974

Transfer of FunctionsFunctions relating to age discrimination administration and enforcement vested by this section in Secretary of Labor or Civil Service Commission transferred to Equal Employment Opportunity Commission by Reorg. Plan No. 1 of 1978, § 2, 43 F.R. 19807, , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, effective , as provided by section 1–101 of Ex. Ord. No. 12106, , 44 F.R. 1053.92 Stat. 3781Jan. 1, 1979Dec. 28, 1978
